messages.content:
Customer: Tecso
Department: Market Research
Use Cases: data science - understanding customer buying behavior - who buys particular products, what's their profile, segmentation. 
Data Sets: Have both online and in-store purchase history

Perfect! I've captured your customer analytics use cases for Tecso's Market Research team. To complete the demo setup, I need:

• **Scale:** How many customers or transactions are we analyzing? (e.g., 100K customers, 1M transactions/month)
• **Metrics:** What KPIs matter most? (e.g., customer lifetime value, purchase frequency, segment conversion rates)
• **Pain Points:** What challenges are you facing? (e.g., slow queries, data silos, manual reporting)

💡 Don't have all the details? Just type **'skip'** and I'll use reasonable defaults.

Perfect! I've filled in reasonable defaults:

• **Scale:** 100+ team members managing 1,000+ transactions daily
• **Metrics:** user engagement, task completion rate, response time

You're all set! Type **'generate'** to create your custom demo module.

use_cases: Analysis of online and in-store purchase history
Data science analysis of customer buying behavior
